title: Unstable Universe
description: Unstalbe Universe one of, if not the most popular scripted minecraft smp. This modpack includes the mods that the members use. I am not affiliated with Unstable.
body: i found myself having huge performance issues, so i tried searching for the mods that the unstable members were using, because there gameplay always felt silky smooth. After many days searching i came to a pretty good conclusion, that is now this modpack. Its pretty accurate if not 1:1 the same. It features every performance mod that you could ever dream of, pvp mods, qol mods, and much much more.
